# Open and read the raw text file
path = "/mnt/data/file-XonM3tNgVVC6Bk77pq1og3-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "rb") as f:
    raw_bytes = f.read()
raw_text = raw_bytes.decode('utf-8', errors='ignore')
len(raw_text), raw_text[:5000]

import re

text = raw_text

# gather candidate phrases manually via locating the braces and quotes
print(text)

# Find content inside the first {...} occurrences
brace_contents = re.findall(r'\{([^}]+)\}', text)
brace_contents

# Find the segment starting with ) "
start_quote = text.find(') "')
start_quote, text[start_quote:start_quote+100]

spans = []

# Ayah 1
a1 = 'إِنَّمَا الْحَيَاةُ الْدُّنْيَا شَتَّى وَالْآخِرَةُ حَسْنَةٌ لَّوْ كَانُوا يَعْلَمُونَ'
start1 = text.find(a1)
end1 = start1 + len(a1)
spans.append((start1, end1, a1, "Aya"))

# Ayah 2
a2 = 'إِنَّمَا أَمْرُنَا إِذَا أَذَنَ لَهُ الْأَمْرُ فَإِنَّ الْأَمْرَ لَيْسَ بِيَدِ الْإِنْسِ'
start2 = text.find(a2)
end2 = start2 + len(a2)
spans.append((start2, end2, a2, "Aya"))

# Ayah 3
a3 = 'إِنَّمَا الْمُبْتَلَىٰ أَصْحَابُ الْجَنَّةِ'
start3 = text.find(a3)
end3 = start3 + len(a3)
spans.append((start3, end3, a3, "Aya"))

# Hadith 1
# Find first double quote after the hadith section index
startq = text.find('"', idx_hadith_section)
endq = len(text)  # no closing quote, so to end
hadith_text = text[startq+1:endq]
# Trim trailing quotes or punctuation on the right as allowed edge trimming
hadith_text = hadith_text.rstrip(' \n\t\'"“”‘’،؛:.,!?…ـ')
# Recompute start index by searching the hadith_text in text near idx
start4 = text.find(hadith_text, idx_hadith_section)
end4 = start4 + len(hadith_text)
spans.append((start4, end4, hadith_text, "Hadeeth"))

spans
